introSection: Olandese Volante is a steel roller coaster located at MagicLand in Valmontone, Lazio, Italy. It opened on 26 May 2011, along with the park. Olandese Volante is Italian for Flying Dutchman.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 5 cars per train. Each car has three rows of two riders except the first car, which only has a single row. Each train seats 26 riders.

fullText:
Olandese Volante is a steel roller coaster located at MagicLand in Valmontone, Lazio, Italy. It opened on 26 May 2011, along with the park. Olandese Volante is Italian for Flying Dutchman.



5 cars per train. Each car has three rows of two riders except the first car, which only has a single row. Each train seats 26 riders.
